videos.video_subject: Kylian Mbappe helped make PSG the biggest club in France, then left for free to join Real Madrid and launched a legal case against PSG demanding around fifty five million euros in unpaid wages and bonuses he says he was owed
videos.video_script: Mbappe made PSG the biggest club in France. Then he left for free and sued them for fifty five million he says they never paid. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Kylian Mbappe Real Madrid celebration close up, Kylian Mbappe PSG, Kylian Mbappe white Real Madrid jersey, Kylian Mbappe France blue jersey, Kylian Mbappe screaming celebration arms crossed, Kylian Mbappe close up face, Kylian Mbappe sprint with the ball, Kylian Mbappe intense face, Kylian Mbappe goal celebration, Kylian Mbappe skills slow motion
